item.name: Citrine Carbuncle Whistle
item.description: A jeweled whistle that emits a heart-melting tone said to summon a Citrine Carbuncle.

mount.name: Citrine Carbuncle
mount.action: Summon forth your Citrine Carbuncle, an arcane entity given form by the mysteries of citrine geometry.
mount.description: Those adventurers who have longed to hop on their Carbuncles' backs can give thanks to the arcanist Ulan, whose research into Diamond Carbuncle provided the necessary cues to create an arcane entity of ridable proportions. As its form is maintained by a large citrine, it can be summoned even by those unversed in the ways of arcanima.
mount.tooltip:
My, what a splendid
thing you are.
- Ulan
